system.description: You know how to use mid-sized Melee weapons effectively. These include gentlemen swords (Jian), ox tail daos, hook swords and staffs (gun). When you attack with such a weapon, make a Medium Melee Skill roll against your opponent's Parry score. If you are throwing the weapon, roll against Evade instead. On a Success, roll Damage Dice based on the weapon against your foe's Hardiness.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 1: Skills
